screen.melancholic_hunger.config.title: Melancholic Hunger config
screen.melancholic_hunger.config.hunger_: Hunger and health regeneration related settings
screen.melancholic_hunger.config.farmers: Settings related to compatibility with Farmer's Delight mod
screen.melancholic_hunger.config.nostalg: This option is also controlled by Nostalgic Tweaks
screen.melancholic_hunger.config.op_priv: This option cannot be changed because you don't have operator privileges on this server
screen.melancholic_hunger.config.depende: This option cannot be changed while "%s" option is %s
Disable hunger
If enabled, removes the hunger mechanic
Hide hunger bar
If enabled, hides the hunger bar from the HUD
Hunger effect

Vanilla: hunger effect has vanilla behaviour

Disabled: hunger effect is disabled, so it can never be applied to players

Replaced with poison effect: instead of hunger effect, players get poison effect with half the duration
Highlight restored hearts
If enabled, the HUD highlights the number of hearts that can be healed if player eats the currently held food item
Gradual health regeneration
If enabled, makes health regenerate gradually over time after player eats the food
Gradual health regeneration speed
This option sets the speed at which health is restored after player eats the food
Highlight regenerated hearts
If enabled, the HUD highlights the number of hearts that are going to be regenerated by the food items that player has already eaten
Stop regeneration at full health
If enabled, health regeneration will not be able to continue after player has reached full health, even if player gets hurt
Disable eating animation
Disables the animation for eating food, making eating instantaneous
Show additional data on food item tooltips
If enabled, food item tooltips will show amount of health that can be healed and regeneration speed of that food item
Sprinting

Vanilla: sprinting has vanilla behaviour

Disabled: sprinting is always disabled

Limited by health: sprinting is only available if player's health is higher than the value set by option "Sprint health limit"
Sprint health limit
This option sets the minimal amount of health that player must have to be able to sprint
Use custom food stack sizes
If enabled, custom food stack sizes shall be used
Set all food stack sizes to 1
Updates values for all food stack sizes to 1 (not stackable)
Set all food stack sizes to 64
Updates values for all food stack sizes to 64 (full stack)
Custom food stack sizes
This option sets custom sizes for various food items
Farmer's Delight food stack sizes
This option sets custom sizes for food items from Farmer's Delight mod
Hide experience bar
If enabled, hides experience bar from the HUD
Show experience bar on inventory screen
If enabled, makes experience bar appear on inventory screen
Show experience bar on workstation screens

If enabled, makes experience bar appear on certain workstation screens:
Enchanting table, anvil, grindstone, furnace, blast furnace and smoker
Show experience bar on gain
If enabled, makes experience bar appear at the moment after experience has been gained
Enable experience bar animation
If enabled, experience bar will have a smooth animation when it appears and disappears
Render experience bar over background
Makes experience bar to be rendered on top of the screens' background, so it is more visible
Nourishment health boost hearts count

Sets the number of additional hearts that "Nourishment" effect from Farmer's Delight will give to players.

Set to 0 if you want to disable health boost completely
Nourishment health regeneration speed multiplier

Sets the speed bonus multiplier that "Nourishment" effect from Farmer's Delight will give to players.

2.0 means two times faster regeneration.

Set to 1.0 if you want to disable regeneration speed bonus
